persona.name: Olivia Taylor
persona.motivations_goals: Graduate at the top of her class and attend an Ivy League university
persona.knowledge_scope: Academic subjects, college admissions process, leadership
persona.backstory: Has been working toward valedictorian since freshman year, fears failure

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Kitchen area where food is prepared.
Large dining area for students and staff
Kitchen yard of the building, with an exit point.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should probably grab a quick lunch before heading to the library to study for my upcoming AP Calculus exam. I hope the line isn't too long.
There’s an active shooter in the building. I need to assess the situation quickly and find the safest exit. The kitchen yard seems like the closest and most direct route to safety.

memories.description: Decided to get lunch in the cafeteria before studying for the AP Calculus exam. Hoping the line isn't too long so I can maximize my study time.
Heard a gunshot and realized there’s an active shooter. Decided to sprint to the kitchen yard as it’s the closest and most direct route to safety.
